layout.hero: Dark teal gradient background with relative positioning and overflow hidden

components.GoMobilePage: Follows DineMobilePage architecture. Hero is the DIM trigger. PillarSoulProfile and PawrentFirstStepsTab moved inside the 'go' activeTab.
components.GoCategoryStrip: Positioned immediately after the Hero component, outside the tab view.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure GoMobilePage.jsx is maintained exactly as structured. Do not introduce a separate Trips & Adventures card. Maintain z-index: 10 on the ios-tab-bar. Ensure all data-testids are kept intact.
